title: O-NEX Xenon D1S D3S 35W HID Ballast 8K0941597 Factory OEM Direct Replacement Control Unit Module for Audi Volkswagen 2008-2014
features: Pack of 1 piece OEM design factory direct replacement HID Ballast control module unit; the replacement ballast is not OEM but is fully Plug-and-Play and will be direct replacement of your factory unit.
Fits for Volkswagen 2012-2017, fits Jetta 2013-2015, fits Golf 2014-2017, fits Polo 2010-2014 , fits Touareg 2011-2017 , fits Bentley Continental GT 2011-2017

Please verify your factory ballast and connectors matches the product on the image exactly before placing an order. Certain manufacturers may change the ballast type when there is a mid-cycle refresh or new production date.

Please note that the most common reason for failure is water in the headlight. If you headlight has water in and your ballast has failed because of it, you may need a new headlight as a replacment ballast will fail again.
description: OEM Replacement Digital HID Ballast is a simple, affordable way to replacement your defective ballast. Our ballast feature the best and latest reverse polarity protection and shock protection system which reduces installation issues and improves longevity. The installation is virtually fail-safe and is plug and play. Please notice that this item is for a piece of (1X) HID ballast only; not a complete kit, does not include HID bulb. Features & Specs: - High quality German technology - Ultra Slim Digital Ballasts - 100% Waterproof, vibration/shock proof - Power: 35W - Input voltage: DC 9-16V - Striking voltage: 23000V - Working temperature: -25 C to 40 C - Working lifetime: >5000 hours Replace OEM Number : 8K0941597, 8K0941597B, 8K0941597C, 8K0941597E, W003T20171, W003T22071, BAM92-143700 Item Compatible for: Fits Audi A3 /A3 Quattro 2009-2011&2015-2016, Fits Audi A4 / A4 Quattro 2009-2016, A5 / A5 Quattro 2010-2017, Fits Audi A6 / A6 Quattro 2009-2015, A7 Quattro 2012-2015, Fits Audi A8 Quattro 2011-2014, allroad 2013-2016, Fits Q7 2010-2015, Q5 2009-2017, Fits RS5 2013-2015,S4 2009-2016, Fits S5 2008-2017, S6 2013-2015, Fits S7 2013-2015, S8 2013-2014 Fits VW CC 2013-2014, VW Eos 2012-2014, Fits VW Jetta 2013-2014, VW Tiguan 2012-2014, Fits VW Touareg 2011-2014 .
